metadata.name: instagram_business__posts
metadata.comment: Each record represents the daily performance of a post or story.

post_caption.name: post_caption
post_caption.comment: The caption of the post or story

created_timestamp.name: created_timestamp
created_timestamp.comment: The timestamp this post or story was created

post_id.name: post_id
post_id.comment: The media ID of this post or story

is_comment_enabled.name: is_comment_enabled
is_comment_enabled.comment: Whether comments are enabled for this post or story

media_type.name: media_type
media_type.comment: Media type. Can be CAROUSEL_ALBUM, IMAGE, or VIDEO.

media_url.name: media_url
media_url.comment: Media URL. Will be omitted from responses if the media contains copyrighted material, or has been flagged for a copyright violation.

thumbnail_url.name: thumbnail_url
thumbnail_url.comment: Media thumbnail URL. Only available on VIDEO media.

username.name: username
username.comment: Username of user who created the media.

carousel_album_engagement.name: carousel_album_engagement
carousel_album_engagement.comment: Total number of likes and IG Comments on the album IG Media object.

carousel_album_reach.name: carousel_album_reach
carousel_album_reach.comment: Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have seen the album IG Media object.

carousel_album_saved.name: carousel_album_saved
carousel_album_saved.comment: Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have saved the album IG Media object.

carousel_album_shares.name: carousel_album_shares
carousel_album_shares.comment: Total number of times the album IG Media object has been shared.

carousel_album_views.name: carousel_album_views
carousel_album_views.comment: Total number of times the album IG Media object has been viewed.

comment_count.name: comment_count
comment_count.comment: Total number of comments on the IG Media object.

like_count.name: like_count
like_count.comment: Total number of likes on the IG Media object.

story_exits.name: story_exits
story_exits.comment: Number of times someone exited the story IG Media object.

story_reach.name: story_reach
story_reach.comment: Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have seen the story IG Media object.

story_replies.name: story_replies
story_replies.comment: Total number of replies to the story IG Media object.

story_taps_back.name: story_taps_back
story_taps_back.comment: Total number of taps to see this story IG Media object's next photo or video.

story_taps_forward.name: story_taps_forward
story_taps_forward.comment: Total number of taps to see this story IG Media object's previous photo or video.

story_shares.name: story_shares
story_shares.comment: Total number of times the story IG Media object has been shared.

story_views.name: story_views
story_views.comment: Total number of times the story IG Media object has been viewed.

video_photo_engagement.name: video_photo_engagement
video_photo_engagement.comment: Total number of likes and IG Comments on the video IG Media object.

video_photo_reach.name: video_photo_reach
video_photo_reach.comment: Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have seen the video IG Media object.

video_photo_saved.name: video_photo_saved
video_photo_saved.comment: Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have saved the video IG Media object.

video_photo_shares.name: video_photo_shares
video_photo_shares.comment: Total number of times the video IG Media object has been shared.

video_photo_views.name: video_photo_views
video_photo_views.comment: Total number of times the video IG Media object has been viewed.

reel_comments.name: reel_comments
reel_comments.comment: Total number of comments on the reel IG Media object.

reel_likes.name: reel_likes
reel_likes.comment: Total number of likes on the reel IG Media object.

reel_reach.name: reel_reach
reel_reach.comment: Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have seen the reel IG Media object.

reel_shares.name: reel_shares
reel_shares.comment: Total number of times the reel IG Media object has been shared.

reel_total_interactions.name: reel_total_interactions
reel_total_interactions.comment: Total number of interactions the reel IG Media object had.

reel_views.name: reel_views
reel_views.comment: Total number of times the reel IG Media object has been viewed.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

carousel_album_impressions.name: carousel_album_impressions
carousel_album_impressions.comment: (DEPRECATED Apr 2025) Total number of times the album IG Media object has been seen

carousel_album_video_views.name: carousel_album_video_views
carousel_album_video_views.comment: (DEPRECATED Apr 2025) Total number of unique Instagram accounts that have viewed video IG Media within the album.

story_impressions.name: story_impressions
story_impressions.comment: (DEPRECATED Apr 2025) Total number of times the story IG Media object has been seen.

video_photo_impressions.name: video_photo_impressions
video_photo_impressions.comment: (DEPRECATED Apr 2025) Total number of times the video IG Media object has been seen.

video_views.name: video_views
video_views.comment: (DEPRECATED Dec 2024) Total number of times the video IG Media object has been viewed.

reel_plays.name: reel_plays
reel_plays.comment: (DEPRECATED Apr 2025) Total number of times the reel IG Media object has been played.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_instagram_business__media_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a version of an Instagram post or story

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran's internal ID for this record

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: When this record was last synced with Fivetran

post_caption.name: post_caption
post_caption.comment: The caption of the post or story

carousel_album_id.name: carousel_album_id
carousel_album_id.comment: The ID of the carousel album this post or story belongs to

created_timestamp.name: created_timestamp
created_timestamp.comment: The timestamp this post or story was created

post_id.name: post_id
post_id.comment: The media ID of this post or story

ig_id.name: ig_id
ig_id.comment: The Instagram media ID of this post or story

is_comment_enabled.name: is_comment_enabled
is_comment_enabled.comment: Whether comments are enabled for this post or story

media_type.name: media_type
media_type.comment: Media type. Can be CAROUSEL_ALBUM, IMAGE, or VIDEO.

media_url.name: media_url
media_url.comment: Media URL. Will be omitted from responses if the media contains copyrighted material, or has been flagged for a copyright violation.

thumbnail_url.name: thumbnail_url
thumbnail_url.comment: Media thumbnail URL. Only available on VIDEO media.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.comment: ID of the user who posted this post or story

username.name: username
username.comment: Username of user who created the media.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.

is_most_recent_record.name: is_most_recent_record
is_most_recent_record.comment: Whether this is the most recent record of this post/story.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_instagram_business__user_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a version of an Instagram user.

_fivetran_id.name: _fivetran_id
_fivetran_id.comment: Fivetran's internal ID for this record

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: When this record was last synced with Fivetran

followers_count.name: followers_count
followers_count.comment: Total number of followers of this user.

follows_count.name: follows_count
follows_count.comment: Total number of users this user follows.

user_id.name: user_id
user_id.comment: The user ID of this user.

ig_id.name: ig_id
ig_id.comment: The Instagram user ID of this user.

media_count.name: media_count
media_count.comment: Total number of media this user has posted.

website.name: website
website.comment: The website linked in the profile of this user.

source_relation.name: source_relation
source_relation.comment: The source of the record, if the unioning functionality is being used.
